name: 1× PBS
ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with HCl or NaOH. Autoclave. Can also dilute from 10× PBS. Store at RT, stable for months.
notes.zh: 用 HCl 或 NaOH 调 pH 至 7.4。高压灭菌。也可由 10× PBS 稀释。室温保存，可稳定数月。

storage.notes: Autoclave or sterile-filter for cell culture

usage.en: Isotonic phosphate-buffered saline; universal wash buffer for cells, tissues, and proteins.
usage.zh: 等渗磷酸盐缓冲液，用于细胞、组织和蛋白质的通用洗涤。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve NaCl, KCl, Na₂HPO₄, and KH₂PO₄ in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
Adjust pH to 7.4 with HCl or NaOH.
Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
